From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Football competition

The **AFC first round** of [2002 FIFA World Cup qualification](/wiki/2002_FIFA_World_Cup_qualification "2002 FIFA World Cup qualification") was contested between 40 [AFC](/wiki/Asian_Football_Confederation "Asian Football Confederation") members.

The top country in each group at the end of the stage progressed to the [second round](/wiki/2002_FIFA_World_Cup_qualification_%E2%80%93_AFC_second_round "2002 FIFA World Cup qualification – AFC second round"), where the ten remaining teams were divided into two groups of five.
